name: libfile-libmagic-perl
title: libfile-libmagic-perl
summary: Perl interface to libmagic for determining file type
description:
Perl interface to libmagic for determining file type
The File::LibMagic module is a simple perl interface to libmagic from the
file-4.x or file-5.x package from Christos Zoulas
(ftp://ftp.astron.com/pub/file/).
.
Libmagic is a library for detecting file type, and works like file(1).
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libfile-libmagic-perl because Perl interface to libmagic for determining file type.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libfile-libmagic-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libfile-libmagic-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libfile-libmagic-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
